parameters.content:
# Jira generic issue enricher
Dado un commit, se busca el SIS y/o el REC, de cada uno se obtienen sus datos correspondientes

parameters.jsCode:
const seed = $('Validate issue seeds').item.json;
return { json: { recordType: 'issue', issueKey: seed.issueKey, seed, payload: $json } };

const seed = $('Validate issue seeds').item.json;
return { json: { recordType: 'commentsPage', issueKey: seed.issueKey, seed, payload: $json } };

const seed = $('Validate issue seeds').item.json;
return { json: { recordType: 'worklogsPage', issueKey: seed.issueKey, seed, payload: $json } };

const seed = $('Validate issue seeds').item.json;
return { json: { recordType: 'changelogPage', issueKey: seed.issueKey, seed, payload: $json } };
